title: Gambling Towers
description: A Paper plugin for a Minecraft minigame where you start over the void, and you get random items every 15 seconds.
body:
# Gambling Towers

A plugin to add the Minecraft minigame Gambling Towers! You and other players start out in a circle around the void, each on your own pieces of bedrock. Every 15 seconds, everyone is given a random item. The goal? Be the last one standing!

A simple formula, but with endless fun.

## Commands

### `/join`

Joins the lobby for the next game.

### `/start`

Starts the Gambling Towers game!

### `/spectate`

Spectates the currently ongoing game, if you were too late to the party.
